main_prompt: Cinematic indoor portrait, elegant urban lady, quiet relaxed posture, fair delicate skin with natural soft radiance, gentle soft eyes, refined facial features, fluffy layered hairstyle, exquisite soft lace home loungewear, warm cozy bedroom ambient light, soft contour backlight, hazy bokeh background, high-end magazine shooting texture, mild contrast, quiet and tender atmosphere, hyper-realistic human skin detail, photorealistic, delicate beauty, soft expression, natural indoor setting
style: cinematic magazine portrait style, hyper-realistic photography, soft filmic look, high-end fashion editorial, warm intimate atmosphere, exceptional skin texture and lighting detail
key_elements: elegant urban lady with refined features, gentle soft eyes, fluffy layered hairstyle, fair delicate glowing skin, soft lace loungewear, relaxed quiet posture, warm cozy bedroom lighting
composition: portrait orientation or horizontal close-up, subject centered with relaxed posture, focus on face and upper body, soft bokeh background emphasizing the figure
lighting_and_colors: warm cozy bedroom ambient light, soft contour backlight creating gentle rim lighting, mild contrast, natural soft radiance on skin, tender and quiet color palette with warm tones
details: hyper-realistic human skin pores and texture, delicate fabric details on lace loungewear, soft hair strands, subtle eye highlights, realistic depth of field, high-end retouching without over-smoothing
